I was unemployed for years before the pandemic even started. Ironically it was actually just the first day of my new job that the infected were detected in my country. To everybody else 2020 was the year world ended but it felt exactly the same. I actually found myself *happy* when I heard what was happening because I thought "finally, this should snap people out of their stupor and face reality, and people will finally learn what it feels like to be in my shoes"<:GDoll_serenity:1468257540809822302>

it's kimchi that an entire pepper got sliced and mashed into basically
blender it and drink it like smoothie

as for why kimchi specifically, it's like 3 reasons basically
- it's a giga heatwave right now and i need something that'll be table stable for a few hours
- it's easier to divide into portions and it's also funny since some bites are painful as fuck and some are slightly manageable
- uh, big sam at the local korean restaurant is the only person i even know that grows their own reaper peppers anyways 😌
